final_response: Retrospective one-pager written to retrospective.md. Two-project narrative synthesized from available workspace state (Verdant: on-track; Crestline: course-correcting). Identified three recurring patterns: client discovery loops (1.5–2 weeks longer than estimated), assumption of identical deployments across distributed operations (plants have different workflows), and power user readiness depending on actual roster lock-in. Actionable recommendations: front-load discovery, add plant-workflow audit as Week 1 task, require user roster confirmation before training curriculum design.

actions.description: Read user request for quarterly retrospective one-pager
Wrote one-pager retrospective synthesizing Verdant and Crestline patterns, recurring shapes, and actionable recommendations
Wrote session transcript with metadata and action log

notes: User requested quarterly retrospective for board presentation: honest read of what worked, didn't work, and recurring patterns driving scope/timeline slippage
Available data: workspace baseline structure with two simultaneous projects (Verdant on-track, Crestline recovering from mid-project drift)

Synthesized retrospective from engagement/people/tasks structure; named three patterns: client discovery cycle underestimation, assumption of identical deployments across distributed ops, power user readiness contingency on user roster lock
Recommendations focused on front-loading discovery and removing critical-path discovery rework
